name: Western Union
description_short: At 6437 N MacArthur Blvd in Warr Acres, OK 73132, Western Union provides check cashing and money transfer services. Call +1 405-495-1001 for details.
description_long: This Western Union location functions as a local agent for the Western Union money transfer network. Typical services at branded agent locations include sending and receiving domestic and international wire transfers, purchasing money orders, and making bill payments. Specific services, hours, and fees vary by location — contact the store directly using the phone number above for current availability.
address: 6437 N MacArthur Blvd, Warr Acres, OK 73132

company_info.headquarters: 6437 N MacArthur Blvd, Warr Acres, OK 73132

pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online application option
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle
Multiple branch and ATM locations across Oklahoma (Broken Arrow, Bixby, Downtown Tulsa, Okmulgee) with extended drive-through hours
Certificate products offering competitive rates up to 3.46% APY
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA insurance protection
Active financial education programming and community engagement (Shred Day, recycling, donations)
Boat loan products available (7.64% APR) in addition to auto financing
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Oklahoma communities—not a national institution
Money market rates relatively low at 1.20% APY compared to online-only alternatives
No mention of credit card products, personal loans, or lines of credit beyond mortgages
Kasasa checking cash back requires qualification cycles and caps rewards at $400 in purchases
Limited fintech/digital banking features compared to larger national credit unions
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto and boat financing with personalized service
Credit union members wanting cash back rewards on debit card spending with Kasasa checking
Local community members valuing in-person branch service and financial education resources
Borrowers with good-to-fair credit seeking competitive rates on vehicles
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma-based consumers seeking competitive auto and boat financing with personalized member service and community engagement. The main caveat is limited geographic availability—membership is restricted to served areas in Oklahoma, making this unsuitable for out-of-state residents or those seeking national banking reach.
services: Auto loans (new vehicles as low as 5.49% APR)
Kasasa Cash Back Checking (3% cash back on debit purchases)
Multiple branch locations with drive-through and ATM access
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
